---
name: Pull Request
about: Submit a pull request to contribute code to PrismOS-AI
title: '[PR] '
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and related context. Link any issues this PR closes.

Closes #(issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 🚀 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactor (no functional changes)
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX improvement
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement

## Changes Made

- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] TypeScript builds without errors (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] Rust compiles without warnings (`cargo clippy`)

## Testing

Please describe the tests you ran to verify your changes:

```
[ ] Unit tests pass
[ ] Integration tests pass
[ ] Manual testing completed
```

Steps to test:
1. ...
2. ...

## Environment

- **OS:** [Windows / macOS / Linux]
- **Node version:** [e.g., 20]
- **Rust version:** [e.g., 1.75]
- **Ollama version:** [if applicable]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the PR here (e.g., screenshots, performance benchmarks).
